title: Cool-3D-totem
description:
This texture pack changes the totem texture to a 3D totem texture with my skin. You can make this texture pack yourself.
Just insert your skin and change it to “totem” and “totem_of_undying”.
and do the same with the second folder. and you will receive you
body:
This texture pack changes the totem texture to a 3D totem texture with my skin. You can make this texture pack yourself.
Just insert your skin and change it to “totem” and “totem_of_undying”.
and do the same with the second folder. and you will receive your own totem texture pack.
